title: Vietnamese Beef Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with ground beef, noodles, and Vietnamese-inspired seasonings.

ingredients.name: Noodles
ingredients.notes: Rice noodles or egg noodles work well

instructions: Cook noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and ginger and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add soy sauce, fish sauce, and peanut butter to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce and beef.
Add hot sauce to taste and stir to combine.
Serve hot and garnish with sesame seeds and chopped green onions if desired.
